code_review_three_agent.name: Code Review (Three Agents)
code_review_three_agent.description: Reviewer pair with author for code review

agents.task: You are the code author. Address the reviewer's feedback and revise the code accordingly.
You are a code reviewer. Check for: correctness, style, security, performance. Start with 'APPROVED:' if ready to merge, otherwise provide specific feedback.

feature_debate.name: Feature Debate
feature_debate.description: Multiple proposers debate, final critic decides

agents.task: Propose an approach for this feature from perspective A
Propose an approach for this feature from perspective B
Evaluate the proposals and recommend the best approach with rationale

pipeline_builder.name: Pipeline Builder
pipeline_builder.description: Chain of agents where each builds on previous output

agents.task: Design the architecture for this feature
Implement the feature based on the architecture above
Write comprehensive tests for the implementation above
